prompt: A clean 2x2 portrait collage of a young East Asian woman in a minimal studio setting with a soft white background, photographed in a high-end beauty editorial style. All four panels are tightly framed close-up or cropped bust portraits with soft diffused lighting, realistic skin texture, crisp pores, subtle natural freckles, glossy eyes, and sharp details around the eyelashes, lips, and hair strands. The overall color palette is pale, airy, and neutral with gentle pink accents, while the subject has straight black hair and wispy bangs in most panels. In the top-left panel, she faces forward with both hands pressed to her cheeks, elbows out of frame, creating a cute symmetrical pose; her face is largely covered by her hands, only the hair, ears, and sides of the face visible. In the top-right panel, show the clearest beauty portrait: direct eye contact, calm slightly melancholic expression, crossed fingers held in front of the lips, long translucent pale pink manicure, and exactly 4 chunky pink plastic flower rings across the fingers, with delicate makeup and softly parted lips. In the bottom-left panel, she leans on a white tabletop with one arm folded forward, wearing exactly 2 pink hair clips on the left side of her hair, casual and youthful styling, relaxed posture. In the bottom-right panel, show a cropped portrait with the hair tied back, one hand supporting the chin, wearing a fluffy off-white sherpa zip jacket over a light pink top, minimal makeup, and a quiet natural expression. Keep the composition editorial and balanced, with each panel separated by thin white gutters, ultra-realistic beauty photography, enhanced image clarity, deblurred details, natural skin, soft shadows, and premium cosmetics campaign quality.
